description: Archiet MCP server: scaffold full-stack apps from PRD text and extract capabilities.
name: io.github.aniekanasuquookono-web/archiet

environmentVariables.description: Workspace-scoped Archiet API key (ak_...). Create one at https://archiet.com/settings/api-keys (Professional plan or higher).
environmentVariables.name: ARCHIET_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Archiet API base URL. Override for self-hosted or staging deployments.
environmentVariables.name: ARCHIET_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds. Codegen jobs can take several minutes.
environmentVariables.name: ARCHIET_API_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

title: Archiet
